name: List catalog types

targetRestContract.notes: Returns all CatalogType rows with no filtering or pagination — full table scan every time. No request parameters of any kind.

notes: The actual location of this file is src/PublicApi/CatalogTypeEndpoints/CatalogTypeListEndpoint.cs — not the CatalogItemEndpoints folder as the command argument stated.
CatalogType.Type (entity property) is mapped to CatalogTypeDto.Name via AutoMapper ForMember in MappingProfile.cs — the Java target must map type.type to dto.name explicitly.
No filtering, no pagination, no path parameters — always returns the entire CatalogTypes table.
AutoMapper is used (same pattern as list-catalog-brands).
BlazorAdmin calls this to populate type dropdowns in create/edit forms.
